Career Journey

Work Experience

Hands-on performance marketing across live client accounts — managing high-budget paid campaigns with measurable, data-driven results.

Stealth Digital Current
Performance Marketing Executive · On-Site
Apr 2026 – Present
  • Promoted to full-time role managing an expanded portfolio of clients across Google Search campaigns, with end-to-end ownership of campaign strategy, execution, and optimisation.
  • Drove campaign optimisation across multiple client accounts through rigorous search term analysis, keyword refinement, and negative keyword management — improving lead quality and reducing CPL.
  • Achieved consistent improvement in conversion volumes by optimising bidding strategies, match types, and ad copy — directly lowering cost-per-lead across accounts.
Stealth Digital
Performance Marketing Intern · On-Site
Jan 2026 – Apr 2026 · 4 Months
  • Managed ₹30L+/month in total paid ad budget across Google Search (₹80K/day) and Meta (₹20K/day) for a college client — independently owning campaign execution, optimisation, and reporting.
  • Drove structured audience targeting, smart bidding (tCPA, Maximize Conversions), and continuous keyword and ad copy refinement.
  • Generated 120–130 high-intent leads/day by improving search term mapping, adding negative keywords, and refining match types — reducing wasted spend by ~18%.
  • Generated 20–30 leads/day via Meta by building warm custom audiences from website visitors and video viewers, and A/B testing creatives to improve CTR and funnel conversion.
  • Managed a separate Google Ads account for a school client (₹15L/month), achieving 70–80 leads/day at ₹625–715 CPL through full campaign restructuring, audience segmentation, and bid strategy overhaul.
Webcart Web Services
Digital Marketing Intern · Delhi NCR
May 2025 – Oct 2025 · 6 Months
  • Managed Google Ads, SEO, and social media initiatives across multiple live client accounts, supporting campaign execution from strategy to reporting.
  • Conducted landing page and on-page SEO optimizations aligned with performance marketing goals — improving Quality Scores and reducing CPCs across active campaigns.
  • Executed A/B tests on ad copy, headlines, and landing page CTAs to identify top-performing variants and improve conversion rates.
  • Supported WordPress content execution and website optimization for improved organic reach, mobile usability, and search visibility.
MJ Marketing Consultancy
Social Media Marketing Intern · Remote
Jul 2025 – Sep 2025 · 2 Months
  • Developed branded social media creatives and structured content calendars aligned with client campaign objectives.
  • Executed day-to-day publishing schedules and supported engagement initiatives to grow online brand presence and audience retention.
